_comment: Machine-readable mirror of tokens.md (the approved human source of truth, 2026-06-16). Builds import THIS. Source = original Klaviyo sends, never recreations.

cta._verified: VERIFIED 2026-06-18 by pixel measurement of original-send slices (designs/welcome-quiz/original/, base64 data-URIs): primary 'TRY STASIS' pill = 236x56px, text glyph 14.5px -> 20px font (two clean reads). The recreation's 15px/57px and design-language.md §5.1's 15px/230x54 were recreation drift. Source = original Klaviyo sends, never recreations.

closing_variant._note: closing-lockup SHOP NOW size-variant: 50px pill / 18px font, measured from original-slice SHOP NOW; ships 50×235 / padding 16px 50px.

cta._vml_note: Component default box = 264x56 at the ~10-char label (re-measured per label; e.g. guarantee-badge 'SHOP DAY + NIGHT SET' = 300, personalized-greeting 'TRACK YOUR PACKAGE' = 272). The original 'TRY STASIS' slice measured 236x56; 264 is the normalized live-text box.
cta._mobile_note: Standard CTA keeps the 20px desktop size on mobile and wraps via .cta-link{white-space:normal !important;}; the hero-variant anchor uses .m-cta{padding:15px 46px !important;}. No font-size shrink ships.

compact_card_variant._note: Card-fit CTAs run below the 20px standalone standard, intentionally — do NOT normalize. pricing-cards-2col SAVE NOW = 15px / padding 15px 28px; pricing-tier-cards = 13px / padding 14px 22px.

in_band_variant._note: Full-width in-band CTA on a navy promo strip (promo-strip-navy): 18px / padding 16px 40px / VML 50x217. A documented variant, not the standalone primary.

type._status: VERIFIED 2026-06-18 — type scale validated via the Bryce-approved live-text rebuild (designs/welcome-quiz/cc-from-spec, approved faithful to originals 2026-06-11); primary elements corroborated by original-slice pixel measurement (CTA 236x56/20px hard-confirmed; stat-numeral dominant line ~58px; H1 dominant band). Reconciled with design-language.md §3. Source basis = original Klaviyo sends.
